sections.title: Attempting to use the furnace without coins in the coffer

lines.speaker: Yohnus
lines.text: Sorry Bwana - I charge a fee of 20 coins to use my furnace.

lines.speaker: Yohnus
lines.text: Sorry, but the smithery is closed. You can use the furnace for a fee, and I can hold a coffer of gold so you don't need to pay each time.

lines.speaker: Yohnus
lines.text: Sorry, but the smithery is closed. But since you've completed the elite tier of the Karamja diary, I will allow you to use the furnace.

sections.title: Talking to Yohnus before completing Shilo Village

lines.speaker: Yohnus
lines.text: I'm getting out of here Bwana, the place is infested with Zombies.
